positive: Minimalist stylized astronaut floating through a nebula of deep royal blue and vibrant teal gas. The astronaut's silhouette is clean and modern, wearing highly detailed, sci-fi protective gear with geometric paneling. The composition features a strong sense of negative space and central subject focus. Lighting is dramatic, featuring bioluminescent accents on the suit and soft gradients emanating from the nebula. High contrast, vector-illustration quality, suitable for screen printing, clean linework, graphic design aesthetic, depth of field, smooth shading, ultra detail.
